executives.name: Dominic Caruso
executives.background: Former Chief Financial Officer of Johnson & Johnson.

executives.name: Gagan Dhingra
executives.background: Mr. Dhingra has served as our Interim Chief Financial Officer and Principal Financial Officer since December 2023. He joined Lucid in September 2022 as Vice President, Accounting and Principal Accounting Officer. Previously, he spent 14 years at Danaher Corporation in various accounting and finance leadership roles.

executives.name: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson
executives.background: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson has been a member of the Board since December 2018. She was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Human Resources Officer of Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.
